clue: Be in power... succeeded mid-term... step down!
explanation: RESIGN: step down. REIGN (be in power) with S (succeeded) "mid-term".
hints: Our definition for this one is "step down".
In cryptics, succeeded can simply be represented by the letter S.
We need a word for "be in power".
S is going to go somewhere in the middle of that term ("mid-term"!).
